summary: Backend auth + read endpoints work; tasks read/update/delete + time logs + admin dashboard endpoints work. Two blocking bugs: (1) POST /api/tasks returns 500 due to ObjectId injected by insert_one (task is persisted but response serialization fails; frontend gets error toast 'Request failed with status code 500'); (2) Admin dashboard page stuck on 'Loading dashboard...' — KPI tiles do not render (api/admin/dashboard returns 200 via curl, so suspect a separate failing call or render path). Employee dashboard renders columns visually but data-testid selectors column-todo/column-in_progress/column-done were not found by selector.
passed: POST /api/auth/login admin -> 200, role=admin, sets access_token+refresh_token httpOnly cookies
POST /api/auth/register -> 200, sets cookies, /auth/me with returned cookies -> 200
PATCH /api/tasks/{id} status=done sets completed_at; status=todo unsets completed_at (verified completed_at=None)
Employee assigning task to another user -> 403
GET /api/admin/dashboard as admin -> 200 with totals/status_counts/per_user; as employee -> 403
Frontend /login loads, admin creds prefilled, admin login redirects to /admin
Logout button clears auth and returns to /login

failed.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error. Task is actually inserted into DB but response serialization fails: `ValueError: [TypeError("'ObjectId' object is not iterable")]`. Root cause: motor's `db.tasks.insert_one(task)` mutates the dict to add `_id`; the same object is then passed to `_enrich_tasks` and returned, so FastAPI tries to serialize an ObjectId. Fix: `task.pop('_id', None)` before enrichment, or re-fetch with projection `{"_id": 0}` (same pattern already used in update_task/list_tasks).
failed.evidence: curl POST /api/tasks -> 'Internal Server Error'; backend.err.log shows ObjectId TypeError in fastapi/encoders.py; frontend toast 'Request failed with status code 500' on Create task click (screenshot captured).

failed.issue: Page stays on 'Loading dashboard...' indefinitely; KPI tiles (kpi-employees, kpi-total-tasks, kpi-completed, kpi-hours-logged) never render. Direct curl to /api/admin/dashboard with admin cookie returns valid 200 JSON, so likely either an additional fetch (e.g. /api/users or per-user list) is failing in the browser, or a rendering guard waits on state that never resolves.
failed.evidence: Screenshot of /admin shows only spinner text 'Loading dashboard...'. All four KPI data-testid elements report is_visible=False after navigation.

failed.issue: data-testid attributes column-todo / column-in_progress / column-done not found by selector (is_visible=False). Visually, To Do / In Progress / Done columns render with task counts, so the testids may have different names or be applied to inner elements. Minor blocker for automated testing.
failed.evidence: Playwright is_visible checks return False for all three column testids; screenshot confirms columns ARE rendered visually.

action_items: Fix POST /api/tasks: strip `_id` before returning or refetch with projection {"_id":0} before calling _enrich_tasks (mirrors update_task pattern at line 292).
Debug AdminDashboard mount: open browser devtools network on /admin to find which call hangs/fails (likely a secondary fetch). Verify loading state resets even when dashboard payload arrives.
Verify/apply data-testid='column-todo|column-in_progress|column-done' on the actual column containers in EmployeeDashboard.jsx for testability.
